notes: Formative/exploratory user study with only 4 participants performing a single code-generation task with Cline (an agentic coding assistant), followed by a Bloom's-Taxonomy-based self-report survey; data analyzed via thematic analysis of short-answer responses and observational notes, plus cross-referencing recall answers with the working directory. Also proposes design opportunities (conceptual framing). Prior 'case-study' signal is a loose fit — this is better characterized as a small observational lab user study.
